### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://massgrave.dev/windows_ltsc_links](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmassgrave.dev%2Fwindows_ltsc_links) ### Comment > Хочу сообщить о ложном срабатывании фильтра безопасности для домена buzzheavier.com. Ваш сервис блокирует его, помечая как вредоносный сайт. > > Этот ресурс используется проектом Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) для хранения оригинальных ISO-образов Windows. Файлы, размещенные там, проходят проверку и соответствуют официальным хэш-суммам MVS/OEM. Это легитимный ресурс для пользователей проекта, и блокировка препятствует доступу к проверенным образам системы. > > Прошу провести повторную проверку данного домена. issue.title: cwtv.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Where is the problem encountered? https://cwtv.com ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Other DNS server: | Private System version: | `macOS 27` Browser: | Firefox Blocklists: | **General**
AdGuard DNS filter
AdGuard DNS Popup Hosts filter
AWAvenue Ads Rule
OISD Blocklist Small
**Other**
Dandelion Sprout's Game Console Adblock List
HaGeZi's Apple Tracker Blocklist
HaGeZi's Samsung Tracker Blocklist
Perflyst and Dandelion Sprout's Smart-TV Blocklist
HaGeZi's Windows/Office Tracker Blocklist
**Security**
Phishing URL Blocklist (PhishTank and OpenPhish)
Dandelion Sprout's Anti-Malware List
HaGeZi's Badware Hoster Blocklist
uBlock₀ filters – Badware risks
NoCoin Filter List
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Comment When using the "Protection against typosquatting" setting, the valid website for the US TV network The CW is blocked as it thinks it's typosquatting "cctv.com". Even adding it as a user rule doesn't fix it, the only way it works is by disabling the typosquatting setting entirely or turning off AdGuard DNS. Also I tried submitting the issue at https://reports.adguard.com/en/new_issue.html and it told me "captcha: This value is too long. It should have 2000 characters or less." right as I hit submit. 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1:

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://caude.ai/login?from=logout](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcaude.ai%2Flogin%3Ffrom%3Dlogout) ### Comment > URL: https://claude.ai/login?from=logout > > Claude is now using a clever tracking metric `?from=logout` > > If a user is found account-switching after burning their usage limits of their previous account, then their newly logged account would have less usage limits applied. > But, the problem is, this even applies for general account switching even if the usage limits are not hit on the first account! They track this constantly with `https://claude.ai/login?from=logout`. > > The `from=logout` specifically. This metric also BLOCKS opening the Google auto-signin dialog box (or the "auto-filler" in some cases in Android/ios, which makes it inherently harder for the user to sign-in to their account- as they now have to sign in by manually entering their username/email/pass. It's an annoyance/tracker. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/6faugk7z2skk0484k400wk48kgwcww0hrxqbxzmg20.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://caude.ai/login?from=logout](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcaude.ai%2Flogin%3Ffrom%3Dlogout) ### Comment > URL: https://claude.ai/login?from=logout > > Claude is now using a clever tracking metric `?from=logout` > > If a user is found account-switching after burning their usage limits of their previous account, then their newly logged account would have less usage limits applied. > But, the problem is, this even applies for general account switching even if the usage limits are not hit on the first account! They track this constantly with `https://claude.ai/login?from=logout`. > > The `from=logout` specifically. This metric also BLOCKS opening the Google auto-signin dialog box (or the "auto-filler" in some cases in Android/ios, which makes it inherently harder for the user to sign-in to their account- as they now have to sign in by manually entering their username/email/pass. It's an annoyance/tracker. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/6faugk7z2skk0484k400wk48kgwcww0hrxqbxzmg20.png?nc=1)

Website or app doesn't work properly ### Where is the problem encountered? https://cwtv.com ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Other DNS server: | Private System version: | `macOS 27` Browser: | Firefox Blocklists: | **General**

Website or app doesn't work properly ### Where is the problem encountered? https://cwtv.com ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Other DNS server: | Private System version: | `macOS 27` Browser: | Firefox Blocklists: | **General**

Also I tried submitting the issue at https://reports.adguard.com/en/new_issue.html and it told me "captcha: This value is too long. It should have 2000 characters or less." right as I hit submit. 2. issue.title: This problem has resurfaced; can it be fixed again?

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
> [@jo2dan94](https://github.com/jo2dan94) Previously, this black screen delay could be completely removed, but after the update, it can no longer be eliminated. This black screen delay is actually a video ad on the website; the main video only loads after the ad has finished playing. Hopefully, this black screen delay can be resolved as soon as possible so that the main video plays directly after opening the app.
> 
> good news. it was just fixed by adam. he is a filter maintainer for adguard who does very good work. can you manually add these to your filters for now. the update should be avabile in a couple hours so just add these for now:
> 
> huavod.top,huavod.net,huavod.com,huaren.live#%#//scriptlet('set-constant', 'ConFig.ad_duration_ms', '0')
> huavod.top,huavod.net,huavod.com,huaren.live#%#//scriptlet('trusted-set-constant', 'mac_player_info.from', 'ARTVIP') 

 _Originally posted by @jo2dan94 in [#229498](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/229498#issuecomment-4275732146)_


This problem has resurfaced; can it be fixed again?@jo2dan94

A new tab opens with the same `maxegatos.net` domain. > 2. The previous/original tab redirects to: > > `https://s.pemsrv.com` > > This appears to be a pop-under or forced redirect behavior. > > Expected behavior: > - Clicking navigation buttons should keep the user on the intended page. > - The original tab should not redirect to a third-party domain. > - No unwanted new tab should open. > > Observed behavior: > - New tab opens to `maxegatos.net`. > - Original tab redirects to `s.pemsrv.com`. > > Please review and consider blocking or filtering the following domains/patterns: > > `maxegatos.net` > `s.pemsrv.com` > `pemsrv.com` > > Suggested filter rules to review: > > ```adblock > ||s.pemsrv.com^ > ||pemsrv.com^ > ||maxegatos.net^$popup > *$popup,domain=maxegatos.net ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/iib8d3cqifc4gckscg4g00oocwwk8s4gbwajszctg0.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.9 (5282) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://kr.trip.com/?locale=ko-kr](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkr.trip.com%2F%3Flocale%3Dko-kr) ### Comment > *AdGuard Popup Blocker* from *Adguard Windows* > Settings > Extensions, needs improvement. > > I tried to log in Trip.com with Google account, the extension prevented the Google OAuth login popup windows. It was fine till then because it seems I could manually disable the prevention via small AdGuard Popup Blocker dialog at right top side that shows 'Options' button. But when I clicked the button, the option dialog appeared under the button, then vanished right away. It keeps vanishing every time I click it. I could not even see what the options are. > > These are my environment: > OS: Windows 11 > Browser: Zen by Mozilla (based on Firefox) > Any other browser extensions: Bitwarden > Any other antivirus: None > > Please fix this issue. Also, if available, exclude Trip.com's OAuth popup from the filter please. ``` Username: @enc2586 ``` ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Platform

macOS

### Protocol

DNS-over-HTTPS

### Do you use AdGuard app?

Yes I am

### Your configuration

_No response_

### Traceroute to AdGuard DNS

_No response_

### Issue Details

The following websites are getting blocked by default AdGuard DNS security features, not a blocklist, but shouldn’t be:

**Typosquatting**
– zkcdn.net (registered 9 years ago, no negative scoring at virustotal)
– v-cdn.net (registered 9 years ago, no negative scoring at virustotal)
– shgcdn.com (registered 8 years ago, no negative score at virustotal)
– bluecode.com (Payment-SDK-provider)
– boox.com (E-Reader manufacturer)
– dwdl.de (German media news portal)
– zinia.com (Spanish  financial service provider by Santander)

**Adult Content Filter**
– stage-entertainment.com (blocked as adult content, but is actually a musical promoter)
– hextom.com (SaaS-company)

### Expected Behavior

_No response_

### Actual Behavior

The domains listed above should not be blocked by default security features.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://kr.trip.com/?locale=ko-kr](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkr.trip.com%2F%3Flocale%3Dko-kr) ### Comment > *AdGuard Popup Blocker* from *Adguard Windows* > Settings > Extensions, needs improvement. > > I tried to log in Trip.com with Google account, the extension prevented the Google OAuth login popup windows. It was fine till then because it seems I could manually disable the prevention via small AdGuard Popup Blocker dialog at right top side that shows 'Options' button. But when I clicked the button, the option dialog appeared under the button, then vanished right away. It keeps vanishing every time I click it. I could not even see what the options are. > > These are my environment: > OS: Windows 11 > Browser: Zen by Mozilla (based on Firefox) > Any other browser extensions: Bitwarden > Any other antivirus: None > > Please fix this issue. Also, if available, exclude Trip.com's OAuth popup from the filter please. ``` Username: @enc2586 ``` ### Screenshots

Safari

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.chemistwarehouse.com.au/checkout
_(Must go to main website first, add any product to cart, then go to checkout.)_

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

AdGuard URL Tracking filter, AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### Social Widgets

AdGuard Social Media filter

### Annoyances

AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist, Phishing URL Blocklist, Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin, uBlock Origin – Badware risks

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

Hide your search queries, Send Do-Not-Track signals, Self-destruction of third-party cookies, Disable cache for third-party requests, Block third-party Authorization header, Hide Referrer from third-parties (specify in comment below, if used custom value), Hide your User-Agent (specify in comment below, if used custom value), Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests, Protect from DPI

### Add your comment and screenshots

As mentioned in:
- https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/233814

Websites that use Google's API for address validation are broken when "Protect from DPI" is enabled in AdGuard.

Could there be a filter rule made in [BaseFilter/sections/allowlist_stealth.txt](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/BaseFilter/sections/allowlist_stealth.txt) to ensure that `maps.googleapis.com` & `places.googleapis.com` are allowed/whitelisted from "Protect from DPI" enabled?

```
@@||maps.googleapis.com$stealth=dpi
@@||places.googleapis.com$stealth=dpi
```

issue.title: False-positive DNS block of legitimate domain tradeskillmaster.ru (AdGuardDNS/1213 block page, likely NRD)
issue.body:
## Summary

A legitimate, newly-registered domain — **tradeskillmaster.ru** (and **www.tradeskillmaster.ru**) — was returned with an **AdGuard DNS block page** instead of being resolved, for a user on a **paid AdGuard DNS** subscription:

```
$ curl -sI http://tradeskillmaster.ru/
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
Content-Type: text/html
Server: AdGuardDNS/1213
```

The request never reaches the origin server (`Server: nginx`) — it is intercepted at the DNS layer and answered by the AdGuard block server. The same request via other resolvers (1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8) and from multiple external vantage points returns the site normally.

## Current state (already partially confirmed by AdGuard support)

AdGuard support replied that the domain is **not blocked on the default side**, and the public report is clean:
- Report: https://reports.adguard.info/en/tradeskillmaster.ru/report

We independently confirmed that the **AdGuard default resolver now returns the real origin IP**, not the block page:

```
dig +short A tradeskillmaster.ru @94.140.14.14    # AdGuard Default       -> 62.109.31.41
dig +short A tradeskillmaster.ru @94.140.14.140   # AdGuard Non-filtering -> 62.109.31.41
```

So this looks like a **transient false positive**, most likely from a **Newly Registered Domains (NRD)** type filter (the domain was registered only days ago). We are filing this per the support team's recommendation so the maintainers can confirm the domain is excluded from any AdGuard-distributed block list and the NRD false positive does not recur for users who enable those lists.

## About the domain (why this is a false positive)

- Legitimate, non-commercial **informational reference site** — a Russian-language guide to the **TradeSkillMaster** addon for World of Warcraft (install instructions, FAQ, module descriptions).
- **No ads, no tracking-for-resale, no malware, no phishing, no PII collection.**
- Valid Let's Encrypt TLS (apex + www), HTTPS + redirects working, complete chain.
- Static site served by nginx.

## Technical details

- Origin IPv4: `62.109.31.41`
- Origin IPv6: `2a01:230:4:e7a::2`
- Block page signature observed: `HTTP/1.1 500`, `Server: AdGuardDNS/1213`

## Request

Please confirm `tradeskillmaster.ru` and `www.tradeskillmaster.ru` are not present in any AdGuard-distributed DNS block list, and add them to exclusions if an NRD/heuristic list is flagging them, so the false-positive block does not recur.

Thank you!

— Developer of the site: KakTak.Net (info@kaktak.net)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [http://pornhub.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fpornhub.com%2F) ### Comment > I have tried using Adguard on windows and the browser extension (for Brave). Using it windows does not block pornhub. It does block other sites, but it only prevents the thumbnails and pictures from loading. The sites can still be accessed. Manually changing the DNS addresses in Windows works, but because that makes certain Youtube videos disappear, I want to avoid using that.
